spruce_reference.note: Reference only; not a Leaf supply-chain source until provenance and licenses are explicit.

source_policy.docker_images: allowed only as pinned build/extraction environments; copied files still need source package or upstream project, license, version, image digest, URL when available, size, and SHA-256
preferred_order: build from source in the MLP1 toolchain container
use pinned upstream release artifacts or PyPI wheels with license, size, and SHA-256
extract from pinned distro/container packages only when package metadata and license are recorded
use opaque vendored blobs only as reference material unless legal provenance is resolved

source_inputs.license: MPL-2.0 with bundled SDL/dependency license files

source_inputs.note: Optional until Leaf smoke tests prove upstream PortMaster needs Pillow. This hash matches the Spruce offline wheel.

production_plan.strategy: build from CPython source with the MLP1 toolchain, or use an exact-version provenance-clean binary artifact while the build is brought up
first try exact PyPI wheel sourcing for pysdl2-dll==2.32.0 on manylinux_2_28_aarch64; build SDL stack from source if wheel sourcing is insufficient
do not include in the required UI runtime unless Leaf smoke tests prove upstream PortMaster needs it
do not reproduce here; continue installing from hash-pinned PortsMaster/PortMaster-GUI releases
